source_jobs.title: Staff Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Dovetail is the Customer Intelligence Platform for the entire organization. We unify fragmented feedback from every touchpoint, including sales calls, support tickets, and research, into a single AI-powered intelligence layer that empowers every team to build, sell, and serve with confidence. Founded in 2017, we are a team of 100+ across our offices in Sydney and San Francisco, working with thousands of teams from Fortune 500 companies to the world’s most innovative startups.

The best never guess. We help teams turn the noise of thousands of customer interactions into the signal required to move faster, prioritize better, and drive revenue.




THE ROLE

As a Staff Engineer at Dovetail, you operate as a force multiplier. Your impact is measured less by the code you write alone and more by the technical direction you set, the hard problems you unblock, and the engineers you make better around you.

You'll take on our most ambiguous, highest-leverage problems, the ones that cross team boundaries and don't have an obvious owner. You'll set architectural direction for systems that process unstructured customer data at scale, and you'll make the calls that shape how we build for the next stage of growth.

This is an in person-first role (4 days a week), working from our Surry Hills HQ.




WHAT YOU'LL DO HERE

 - Set technical direction across your team, making architecture and design decisions that balance speed today against scale tomorrow.

 - Drive complex, cross-functional projects from ambiguity to shipped, working closely with product, design, and other engineering teams to create delightful experiences for our customers.

 - Raise the engineering bar through code review, system design, technical standards, and the kind of mentorship that levels up everyone around you.

 - Own the reliability, performance, and security of systems handling enterprise-grade customer data. Identify the technical work that matters most and make the case for it, then do the thing.

 - You'll maintain and foster a pragmatic approach to software development, while also collaborating to establish detailed guidelines and standards for product development processes based on industry best practices and your experience.




YOUR BACKGROUND

 - Extensive experience building web products. You'll have hands-on exposure building full-stack web applications, including frontend websites and backend services with technologies like TypeScript, React, GraphQL, Node, PostgreSQL on top of cloud vendors like AWS and GCP. Previous experience with an object-oriented programming language, such as C++, Java, Python, etc. is essential for this role.

 - Experience managing software projects. You'll have the ability to own the delivery of complex features, break down requirements, and provide reasonable estimates.

 - A passion for innovation and learning. We’re an AI native business. We build products using AI and ML-based technologies like Bedrock and the best models from Anthropic, Google and Amazon. You architect and ship AI-native product features, from semantic clustering and theme detection to agentic workflows, with a real grasp of the production tradeoffs around latency, cost, evaluation, and reliability. You also use AI to multiply your own output and push your teams to do the same,

 - You are pragmatic and flexible. Like your new teammates, you're used to doing what's necessary to get the job done. You'll need to be comfortable with ambiguity, be resourceful to solve problems, and be able to adjust to shifting deadlines and project goals.

 - When you do it, you nail it. You share our keen eye for quality. You don't half-ass your work; instead, what you ship is top-notch. You cut scope before cutting quality.

 - Excellent, concise communicator. You can easily convey your thoughts, opinions, and feelings with your product team and have the ability to strongly articulate effort vs impact tradeoffs.






WHY YOU'LL LOVE IT HERE

We hire smart people and look

source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative (SDR)
source_jobs.description:
Dovetail is the Customer Intelligence Platform for the entire organization. We unify fragmented feedback from every touchpoint, including sales calls, support tickets, and research, into a single AI-powered intelligence layer that empowers every team to build, sell, and serve with confidence. Founded in 2017, we are a team of 100+ across our offices in Sydney and San Francisco, working with thousands of teams from Fortune 500 companies to the world’s most innovative startups.

The best never guess. We help teams turn the noise of thousands of customer interactions into the signal required to move faster, prioritize better, and drive revenue.



The role

Based remotely, you’ll be the first point of contact for some of the world’s most innovative teams—identifying opportunities, generating leads, and working closely with our Account Executives. This is a hands-on, high-impact role where your work will directly influence how our Customer Intelligence Platform scales. If you’re passionate about building relationships, enjoy solving complex problems, and want to grow your career in a fast-paced, high-growth SaaS environment, this role is for you!

Please note that we're only able to accept applicants who are based in the following states for this role: California, Texas, Michigan, New Jersey, Arizona, New York, and Florida.

 

What you’ll do

 - Be a founding member of the SDR team. Support the design, tooling, and playbook development for our new sales development motion—helping establish the gold standard for outreach, messaging, and lead qualification at Dovetail.

 - Own top-of-funnel pipeline generation. Proactively identify, research, and engage prospects across our total addressable market—from inbound interest to outbound targeting—using multi-channel outreach (email, phone, social, video).

 - Partner cross-functionally with Marketing and Sales. Collaborate closely with Demand Generation, RevOps, and Account Executives to develop effective messaging, lead scoring, and ABM-style campaigns for enterprise prospects.

 - Consult and educate. Approach conversations with prospects through a consultative lens. Ask thoughtful questions, uncover pain points, and articulate the impact of adopting an AI-first insights platform.

 - Leverage AI and data tools. Use tools like HubSpot, Clay, Mixmax, and Sales Navigator alongside Dovetail’s own platform to personalize outreach and optimize conversions.

 - Develop the blueprint for scale. Document repeatable outreach processes, A/B test messaging, and share learnings that improve response rates, conversion, and productivity across the team.

 - Qualify and hand off leads. Drive high-quality meetings for Account Executives, ensuring contextual insight is shared for a seamless transition through the pipeline.

 - Represent our brand with empathy and curiosity. Every interaction is a first impression of Dovetail—model the tone, professionalism, and curiosity that reflect our customer-obsessed culture.

What you’ll bring

 - Experience in outbound prospecting. 1–3 years of SDR or BDR experience in B2B SaaS, in early-stage/scale-up companies, or targeting product, design, or research personas (experience at high-growth firms like Notion, Figma, or Atlassian is a plus).

 - Enterprise-awareness. Understanding of how mid-market and enterprise organizations make purchase decisions—and how to navigate complex account maps with multiple stakeholders.

 - Multi-threaded outreach execution. Proven use of personalized, high-quality outreach across email, phone, social, and video, leveraging trigger-based campaigns and creative touchpoints.

 - Tech stack fluency. Familiarity with CRMs (HubSpot or Salesforce), prospecting tools (Sales Navigator, Clay, Apollo), and sequence builders (Mixmax, Outreach).

 - Analytical and operational mindset. You use data to guide decisions, track performance against KPIs (meetings set, pipeline influence, conversion rate), and optimize your workflow.

 - Clear commun

source_jobs.title: Site Reliability Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Dovetail is the Customer Intelligence Platform for the entire organization. We unify fragmented feedback from every touchpoint, including sales calls, support tickets, and research, into a single AI-powered intelligence layer that empowers every team to build, sell, and serve with confidence. Founded in 2017, we are a team of 100+ across our offices in Sydney and San Francisco, working with thousands of teams from Fortune 500 companies to the world’s most innovative startups.

The best never guess. We help teams turn the noise of thousands of customer interactions into the signal required to move faster, prioritize better, and drive revenue.



We're looking for SRE and DevOps Engineers to join our platform engineering team. Over the next 18 months, we will invest significant effort in growing our platform engineering team and the operational excellence they will drive across the business. You’ll bring relevant SRE experience to help us accelerate it.



What you will do

 - Join our platform engineering team. You'll be a crucial part of our platform team, working closely with your engineering manager, technical product manager, and other engineers to evolve our internal systems and platforms.

 - Own the technologies that power our engineering. You'll be responsible for cross-cutting technologies that support all Dovetail engineers in delivering value to our customers. You’ll directly impact delivery performance, developer experience, reliability, and the end-to-end customer experience by delivering excellent internal products.

 - Support high-quality product infrastructure. Working with your team, you'll participate in the design and implementation of technical solutions for Dovetail’s platform, including infrastructure, application foundations, developer tooling, CI/CD, and observability.

 - Help mature our operational health. You’ll bring an SRE mindset to promote operational practices within our platform and product teams. Your hard work will support state-of-the-art reliability and performance for our rapidly growing customer base.

 - Support other engineers. We're scaling quickly, so you'll work with others to continually improve our software practices through code review, pair programming, design sparring, and career growth.

 - Foster a culture of pragmatism. You'll maintain and foster a pragmatic approach to software development while also collaborating towards establishing detailed guidelines and standards for product development processes based on industry best practices and your experience.




What you will bring

 - Experience in platform engineering. You'll have experience with technologies similar to TypeScript, GraphQL, Aurora PostgreSQL, AWS, containerization (EKS or ECS), serverless technologies, developer tooling, and infrastructure-as-code (Pulumi and Terraform). While you don’t need to be a master of our technology stack, you’re a fast learner and understand relevant concepts.

 - You’re a disciplined operator. You’re a strong owner, who’s used to owning the platform reliability, performance security for high growth platforms. You hold a high bar on ensuring that we keep our test and release, and operational hygiene in a good state, so everyone can sleep well.

 - Experience working on platform projects. You'll have the ability to play a significant role in the delivery of complex features, understand requirements, and drive quality.

 - You are pragmatic and flexible. Like your new teammates, you're used to doing what's necessary to get the job done. You'll need to be comfortable with ambiguity, operate with high independence, be resourceful in solving problems, and be able to adjust to shifting deadlines and project goals.

 - When you do it, you nail it. You share our keen eye for quality. You don't half-ass your work, instead what you ship is top-notch. You cut scope before cutting quality.

source_jobs.title: Product Marketing Manager
source_jobs.description:
Dovetail is the Customer Intelligence Platform for the entire organization. We unify fragmented feedback from every touchpoint, including sales calls, support tickets, and research, into a single AI-powered intelligence layer that empowers every team to build, sell, and serve with confidence. Founded in 2017, we are a team of 100+ across our offices in Sydney and San Francisco, working with thousands of teams from Fortune 500 companies to the world’s most innovative startups.

The best never guess. We help teams turn the noise of thousands of customer interactions into the signal required to move faster, prioritize better, and drive revenue.




ABOUT THE ROLE

As our Product Marketing Manager, you will partner with the marketing, product, sales, and customer success teams to bring Dovetail to market and shape how customers and prospects understand the value of our platform.

This is a hands-on, high-leverage role for a builder. You will drive a clear set of outcomes across positioning, product launches, customer stories, webinars, blogs, video content, and competitive narrative by integrating AI into your daily craft. We are looking for someone who treats modern AI tools as a system to be designed, not a shortcut to be reached for, and who has the taste to know when the output is ready to ship.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build repeatable, AI-powered marketing systems. You will design and operate the workflows, prompts, and tooling that let us produce content at a higher quality bar and at greater speed than a traditional product marketing function. You will partner closely with our engineering teams to ship internal tools and unlock automation in places a traditional product marketer cannot reach.

 - Direct AI to ship work with taste. You will set the quality bar and bring the editorial judgment that turns raw model output into copy that sounds like Dovetail. You will know when a draft is ready, when it is not, and what to change to close the gap.

 - Drive positioning and messaging across our product surfaces. You will manage the copy on our website, including persona and use case pages, comparison pages, blogs, and product pages, keeping our story sharp, opinionated, and consistent across every customer touchpoint.

 - Lead product launches end to end. You will partner with product, design, marketing, and engineering on launch planning, then execute across channels including blog, email, social, sales enablement, and web, so every release lands with impact.

 - Build the customer story library. Alongside the brand and content team, you will ship a steady cadence of customer stories, from named case studies of our most strategic accounts to a wider library of anonymized stories. You will run the work end to end: identifying the story, interviewing the customer, and shipping the asset.

 - Sharpen our competitive narrative. You will manage our competitive positioning and displacement messaging, equip sales with battlecards and objection-handling material, and feed wins and losses back into our positioning.

 - Enable our go-to-market teams. You will arm sales and customer success with the assets, talk tracks, and proof points they need to win deals and drive expansion, and partner closely with the SDR team on outbound content and campaigns.




SKILLS AND EXPERIENCE

 - Taste. A high editorial bar across formats, with a portfolio that demonstrates clarity, voice, and judgment, including website copy, blog, customer stories, and sales collateral. You can articulate why a piece of work is good or bad, and you hold others to the same standard.

 - AI fluency as craft. Hands-on with modern AI tools such as Claude or ChatGPT, with concrete examples of workflows you have designed and improved over time. You see AI as a system to operate, not a button to press, and you know how to direct it to produce work that meets your standard.

 - A systems builder. Comfortable partnering with engineers to ship internal tools, prompts, and automat

source_jobs.title: Tech Lead Manager - Data Platform
source_jobs.description:
Dovetail is the Customer Intelligence Platform for the entire organization. We unify fragmented feedback from every touchpoint, including sales calls, support tickets, and research, into a single AI-powered intelligence layer that empowers every team to build, sell, and serve with confidence. Founded in 2017, we are a team of 100+ across our offices in Sydney and San Francisco, working with thousands of teams from Fortune 500 companies to the world’s most innovative startups.

The best never guess. We help teams turn the noise of thousands of customer interactions into the signal required to move faster, prioritize better, and drive revenue.



The role

You'll be building the data backbone of a Customer Intelligence Platform. Our mission is simple to state and hard to execute: make Dovetail the obvious home for all customer feedback data, by removing barriers to ingestion and increasing the value of data the moment it lands.

As Tech Lead Manager on our backend data platform team, you’ll lead that work technically and lead the people doing it, setting direction on distributed systems projects, coaching talented backend engineers, and keeping the team unblocked day to day. You'll be working on video processing at scale, transcription, and the core infrastructure that turns raw customer data into clear, actionable insights.

This is an in-person-first role, where you'll be working four days from our Surry Hills HQ. This is an excellent opportunity for a Senior Software Engineer with technical leadership experience, offering a credible step toward an Engineering Manager role.

 

What you'll do

 - Coach and develop talented backend engineers. You'll do this through code review, pairing, and design discussions that raise the technical bar for the team.

 - Run the team’s core rituals, including standups and sprint planning, and do the day-to-day work of keeping the team unblocked.

 - Build reliable customer data integrations. Design and maintain the systems that continuously sync customer data from tools like Gong, Intercom, Zendesk, Slack, HubSpot, and more into Dovetail. You'll build reliable, scalable integrations with robust authentication, rate limiting, error handling, and monitoring.

 - Build our core data platform. Develop the shared data pipeline that transforms raw customer data into clean, enriched datasets used across Dovetail. You'll help create a scalable foundation that powers features and future AI capabilities.

 - Create reusable data infrastructure. Build systems that allow customer data to be ingested once and reused across multiple teams and products, reducing duplicate processing and making our platform faster, more efficient, and easier to scale.

 - Develop data enrichment services. Build pipelines that automatically transcribe conversations, redact sensitive information, link customer records, and extract structured insights so every product surface works from the same high-quality data.

 - Scale distributed backend systems. Design event-driven architectures that process millions of customer records efficiently. You'll improve system reliability, optimise processing pipelines, and build the monitoring and observability tools that help the team quickly detect and resolve issues.

 

What you'll bring

 - Deep engineering technical expertise, operating at a senior level with 1-2 years’ experience as a tech lead or team lead, with direct exposure to engineering at scale.

 - Deep backend and data processing experience, including systems that need to perform at scale. Exposure to media or data-in-motion pipelines, such as video processing or transcription, is a strong plus.

 - A passion for innovation and learning. We’re an AI native business, and we expect you to already be embedding AI into your day-to-day work: knowing when to leverage it, how to direct it effectively, and how to apply it to improve the quality, speed, and impact of what you ship.

 - You are pragmatic and flexible. Like your new team

source_jobs.title: Account Executive (Enterprise)
source_jobs.description:
Dovetail is the Customer Intelligence Platform for the entire organization. We unify fragmented feedback from every touchpoint, including sales calls, support tickets, and research, into a single AI-powered intelligence layer that empowers every team to build, sell, and serve with confidence. Founded in 2017, we are a team of 100+ across our offices in Sydney and San Francisco, working with thousands of teams from Fortune 500 companies to the world’s most innovative startups.

The best never guess. We help teams turn the noise of thousands of customer interactions into the signal required to move faster, prioritize better, and drive revenue.



The role

We're looking for an Enterprise Account Executive to join Dovetail and own the full sales cycle for our largest and most strategic accounts. You'll partner with some of the world's most sophisticated organizations to solve complex problems with a consultative, value-led approach, while helping shape how our Customer Intelligence Platform scales into the enterprise. If you love navigating multi-stakeholder deals and want to have a real impact in a high-growth SaaS environment, this role is for you.

Please note that we're only able to accept applicants who are based in the following states for this role: California, Texas, Michigan, New Jersey, Arizona, New York, and Florida.



What you will do

 - Manage the end-to-end enterprise sales process. You'll own the full sales cycle for our largest prospects, from initial engagement to close, running multi-threaded deals across procurement, IT, legal, security, and executive stakeholders. You'll navigate long, complex cycles without losing momentum.

 - Employ a consultative, value-based sales approach. You'll build a business case tailored to each stakeholder, from the economic buyer to the technical evaluator, and deliver demonstrations that speak to each audience's priorities.

 - Sell an AI-native platform, the AI-native way. You'll speak fluently to how Dovetail's AI turns fragmented feedback into decision-ready intelligence, including how it handles enterprise-grade security and governance questions, and you'll use AI tools yourself to research accounts, prepare for multi-stakeholder calls, and manage the volume of detail a long enterprise cycle demands.

 - Become a Dovetail expert. You'll develop an intimate knowledge of how Dovetail works, what Dovetail is capable of, and an understanding of the competitive and market landscape at the enterprise tier so you can position confidently against alternatives.

 - Build and manage a strategic account plan. You'll map organizations, identify champions, and build relationships across departments to expand your footprint within each account over time.

 - Develop and maintain deep executive relationships with your prospects. You'll manage the trust and stakeholder alignment that enterprise deals require, and partner closely with customer success to ensure a smooth handoff and a strong foundation for expansion.

 - Help mature our Enterprise go-to-market motion. You'll work with the Sales team to refine how we sell into large, complex organizations, and pioneer new practices as we build out our product-led sales strategy.



What you will bring

 - Experience in a consultative, value-based sales role for an enterprise SaaS business.

 - Proven experience closing large, complex deals in a high-growth sales environment. Help us identify you by sharing your results, including deal size and cycle length. Ideally, you would have also contributed to building an enterprise sales motion at an early-stage company.

 - Extensive experience managing multi-stakeholder sales cycles, including procurement, security, and legal review processes, while delivering a positive experience for every stakeholder involved.

 - AI fluency as a working habit. You already use AI tools to prospect, research, and prepare for complex deals, and you can point to specific ways they've made you faster or sharper, not

source_jobs.title: Account Executive (Mid-market)
source_jobs.description:
Dovetail is the Customer Intelligence Platform for the entire organization. We unify fragmented feedback from every touchpoint, including sales calls, support tickets, and research, into a single AI-powered intelligence layer that empowers every team to build, sell, and serve with confidence. Founded in 2017, we are a team of 100+ across our offices in Sydney and San Francisco, working with thousands of teams from Fortune 500 companies to the world’s most innovative startups.

The best never guess. We help teams turn the noise of thousands of customer interactions into the signal required to move faster, prioritize better, and drive revenue.



The opportunity

We’re looking for a Mid-market Account Executive to join Dovetail and own the full sales cycle. You’ll partner with some of the world’s most innovative teams to solve complex problems with a consultative, product-led approach - while helping shape how our Customer Intelligence Platform scales. If you love building deep customer relationships and want to have a real impact in a high-growth SaaS environment, this role is for you.

Please note that we're only able to accept applicants who are based in the following states for this role: California, Texas, Michigan, New Jersey, Arizona, New York & Florida.

 

What you will do

 - Manage the end-to-end sales process. You'll own the full sales cycle for our mid-market prospects, from inbound lead to close, through a consultative sales approach. You will help customers navigate complex sales cycles and manage relationships with procurement, IT, and legal to close new business.

 - Employ a consultative sales approach to help our prospects. You'll create and deliver your own consultative demonstrations of Dovetail, tailored to customer needs, for a range of audiences.

 - Sell an AI-native platform, the AI-native way. You'll speak fluently to how Dovetail's AI turns fragmented feedback into decision-ready intelligence, including how it handles enterprise-grade security and governance questions, and you'll use AI tools yourself to research accounts, prepare for multi-stakeholder calls, and manage the volume of detail a long enterprise cycle demands.

 - Become a Dovetail expert. You'll develop an intimate knowledge of how Dovetail works, what Dovetail is capable of, and an understanding of the market so that you can effectively help our prospects.

 - Develop and maintain amazing relationships with your prospects. You foster a desire to lead stakeholders in every interaction throughout the entire sales cycle to ensure a delightful and positive experience. You'll partner with customer success during the sales process to ensure your prospects are set up for success as they adopt Dovetail.

 - Help mature our global mid-market business. You'll work with the Sales team to contribute to the overall growth of our global small to medium-sized business, and pioneer new practices to improve our sales efficiency as we mature our product-led sales strategy.

 

What you will bring

 - Experience in a consultative sales role for a SaaS business.

 - Proven experience performing in a high-growth sales environment. Help us identify you by sharing your results. Ideally, you would have also contributed to an early-stage sales team

 - Extensive consultative selling skills, with skills to navigate complex sales cycles, while delivering a delightful customer experience throughout the process.

 - Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the operational skills to develop, report on, simplify, and improve sales processes.

 - AI fluency as a working habit. You already use AI tools to prospect, research, and prepare for complex deals, and you can point to specific ways they've made you faster or sharper, not just that you've tried them.

 - Concise communication so you can easily convey your thoughts, opinions, and feelings with customers and teammates.

 - The right attitude towards a sense of urgency, risk, and ambiguity that naturally

notes: Dovetail is a customer intelligence platform with a strong engineering core, posting a mix of tech and sales roles.
